creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-01-17 08:37:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/xmlada-gcc  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    textproc/xmlada-gcc/files patch-Makefile.in 
  Added files:
    textproc/xmlada-gcc/files 
                              patch-schema_schema-validators-extensions.adb 
                              patch-schema_schema-validators-restrictions.adb 
  Removed files:
    textproc/xmlada-gcc/files patch-shared.gpr.in 
  Log:
  The XmlAda library includes a set of Ada2005 packages to manipulate XML
  input. It implements the XML 1.0 standard, as well as support for
  namespaces and a number of other optional standards related to XML.
  
  WWW: http://libre.adacore.com/
  
  PR:             ports/107435
  Submitted by:   John Merryweather Cooper <john_m_cooper@yahoo.com>
  Repocopy by:    marcus
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2       +39 -38    ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/distinfo
  1.2       +77 -8     ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/files/patch-Makefile.in
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/files/patch-schema_schema-validators-extensions.adb (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/files/patch-schema_schema-validators-restrictions.adb (new)
  1.2       +0 -9      ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/files/patch-shared.gpr.in (dead)
  1.2       +4 -15     ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/pkg-descr
  1.2       +14 -23    ports/textproc/xmlada-gcc/pkg-plist
